name: doitoo-games
description: Doitoo Games — a multi-game launcher platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n platform,numbers,nback -c blue,green,magenta "npm run serve" "npm run watch:numbers" "npm run watch:nback"
scripts.build:games: npm run build:numbers && npm run build:nback && npm run build:mtask
scripts.build: npm run build:games && npm run build:platform
